title: Define v2.0 knowledge schema in packages/shared (frontmatter + agents.meta + event-ledger types)
description: Establish the v2.0 type/maturity/layer schema as the contract surface. Adds new fields to ruleDescriptionSchema (id, type, maturity, layer, layer_reason, created_at) — all FLAT scalars per existing parser constraint at rule-meta-builder.ts:748-785 (no nested objects). Extends agentsMetaSchema with `counters: {KP: number, KT: number}` envelope for stable_id allocator. Defines new TypeScript enums for the 5 knowledge types and 3 maturity levels. Does NOT yet add new event types — those are introduced in rc.2/rc.3 alongside the tools that emit them. This task is purely contract-level; no behavior changes.

files.change: Add KNOWLEDGE_TYPES = ['decision','pitfall','guideline','model','process'] enum + type code map ('decision'→'D', 'pitfall'→'P', 'guideline'→'G', 'model'→'M', 'process'→'PR'). Add KNOWLEDGE_MATURITIES = ['proposed','validated','deprecated']. Add KNOWLEDGE_LAYERS = ['team','personal'] (distinct from existing AGENTS_META_LAYERS L0/L1/L2 — these are storage layers, not protocol tiers). Extend ruleDescriptionSchema with optional fields: id (regex /^K[PT]-(D|P|G|M|PR)-\d+$/), type (KNOWLEDGE_TYPES enum), maturity (KNOWLEDGE_MATURITIES), layer (KNOWLEDGE_LAYERS), layer_reason (string), created_at (ISO 8601). Extend agentsMetaSchema with `counters: z.object({ KP: z.number().int().nonneg().default(0), KT: z.number().int().nonneg().default(0) }).optional()`. Add zod transformer that validates id-prefix-matches-layer (KP-* requires layer='personal', KT-* requires layer='team').

Re-export type/maturity/layer from agents-meta.ts in description payload of plan_context response so MCP clients can filter by these fields. Add ruleDescriptionSchema strict() to allow excess properties without rejecting legacy frontmatter (during transition). No breaking change to existing fields.

Add ONE new event type for rc.1: `init_scan_completed` (payload: { entries_created: number, types: KnowledgeType[], scan_duration_ms: number }) — emitted by TASK-007 scan command. Do NOT add knowledge.proposed/promoted/layer_changed (those belong to rc.2/rc.3). Existing 17 event types stay unchanged.

Export KnowledgeType, KnowledgeMaturity, KnowledgeLayer types alongside existing AgentsLayer/AgentsTopologyType for downstream consumers. Add KnowledgeIdComponents type { layer: KnowledgeLayer, type: KnowledgeType, counter: number } and serialize/parse helpers (formatKnowledgeId / parseKnowledgeId).

implementation: Read packages/shared/src/schemas/agents-meta.ts to understand existing AGENTS_META_LAYERS/topology_type pattern; mimic structure for new enums
Add KNOWLEDGE_TYPES, KNOWLEDGE_MATURITIES, KNOWLEDGE_LAYERS as `as const` tuples + corresponding z.enum() schemas at top of file (next to AGENTS_META_LAYERS)
Add KNOWLEDGE_TYPE_CODE_MAP record so id-builder/parser share single source

Extend ruleDescriptionSchema as `.extend({ id: z.string().regex(...).optional(), type: ..., maturity: ..., layer: ..., layer_reason: z.string().optional(), created_at: z.string().datetime().optional() }).strict(false)` — strict(false) lets unknown keys flow through during transition
Extend agentsMetaSchema with `counters` field (optional with defaults so existing meta files load without migration error)
Add formatKnowledgeId(components) → 'KP-D-1' / parseKnowledgeId(id) → components in types/agents.ts
In event-ledger.ts add init_scan_completed to discriminated union following existing pattern (e.g. meta_reconciled at relevant section)
Run `pnpm --filter @fabric/shared build` and `pnpm typecheck` to verify schema compiles
Add minimal unit tests for parseKnowledgeId / formatKnowledgeId roundtrip

reference.pattern: Existing agents-meta.ts schema extension pattern; flat-scalar frontmatter constraint from rule-meta-builder.ts:748-785
reference.examples: Mirror the AGENTS_META_LAYERS/agentsLayerSchema pair pattern for each new enum. Keep all frontmatter fields flat per regex parser constraint — DO NOT introduce nested objects like maturity:{level:'validated', last_review:'2026-05-10'}; use flat layer_reason / created_at instead.

criteria: `pnpm --filter @fabric/shared build` exits 0 with new types exported

ruleDescriptionSchema accepts a fixture object containing all 6 new fields (id='KP-D-1', type='decision', maturity='proposed', layer='personal', layer_reason='solo-dev preference', created_at='2026-05-10T00:00:00Z') without error
ruleDescriptionSchema rejects mismatched id+layer (e.g. id='KP-D-1' with layer='team') with descriptive error
agentsMetaSchema accepts existing v1.x meta files without `counters` field (backward compatible via optional) and applies default {KP:0,KT:0} when absent
formatKnowledgeId({layer:'team', type:'process', counter:7}) === 'KT-PR-7' and parseKnowledgeId roundtrips
event-ledger.ts discriminated union accepts init_scan_completed event with required payload fields
All shared package tests still pass (`pnpm --filter @fabric/shared test`)

rationale.chosen_approach: Additive schema extension with backward-compatible optional fields; flat scalars to fit existing parser
alternatives_considered: Replace ruleDescriptionSchema entirely (rejected — breaks v1.x meta files in flight, blocks parallel TASK-001 delete)
Upgrade frontmatter parser to gray-matter for nested support (rejected — out-of-scope refactor; flat works per discussion Q4 decision)
decision_factors: Counter envelope additive avoids meta migration
Type code map enables stable id format KP-D-N
rationale.tradeoffs: All knowledge fields optional during transition means runtime code in TASK-004/005 must handle missing fields; mitigated by TASK-007 scan ensuring all new entries have full schema

manual_checks: Verify type-check across packages still passes after schema change
success_metrics: Schema validates 4+ positive fixtures (each knowledge type)
Schema rejects 3+ negative fixtures (mismatched id/layer, invalid type, malformed counter)
